post.description:
Sample request:

    POST /api/auth/signup
    {
        "email": "user@example.com",
        "password": "SecurePass123"
    }
    
Password requirements:
- Minimum 8 characters
- At least one uppercase letter
- At least one lowercase letter
- At least one digit

requestBody.description: Registration details including email and password

200.description: Returns the JWT token and user email

400.description: If the user already exists or password is invalid

requestBody.description: Login credentials including email and password

200.description: Returns the JWT token and user email

post.summary: Initiates password reset process by sending a reset token to the user's email
post.description:
Sample request:

    POST /api/auth/forgot-password
    {
        "email": "user@example.com"
    }
    
Notes:
- For security reasons, the API doesn't reveal whether the email exists
- Reset token is valid for 1 hour
- In development, the token is logged to console
- In production, configure SMTP to send actual emails

requestBody.description: Request containing the user's email address

200.description: Returns success message (always returns this for security)

post.summary: Resets user password using a valid reset token
post.description:
Sample request:

    POST /api/auth/reset-password
    {
        "token": "base64-encoded-reset-token",
        "newPassword": "NewSecurePass123"
    }
    
Password requirements:
- Minimum 8 characters
- At least one uppercase letter
- At least one lowercase letter
- At least one digit

Token requirements:
- Must be unused
- Must not be expired (valid for 1 hour)

requestBody.description: Request containing the reset token and new password

400.description: If the token is invalid/expired or password doesn't meet requirements

post.summary: Logs out the current user by invalidating their JWT token
post.description:
Sample request:

    POST /api/auth/logout
    Headers: Authorization: Bearer {your-jwt-token}
    
Notes:
- Requires valid JWT token in Authorization header
- Token is added to blacklist and cannot be reused
- Token remains blacklisted until its natural expiration

401.description: If the token is missing or invalid

get.summary: Retrieves all sites with their complete data
get.description:
Sample response:

    GET /api/sites
    [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "nom": "Tour Eiffel Office Complex",
        "typeSite": "Bureau",
        "anneeConstruction": 2018,
        "superficieM2": 15000.50,
        "nombreEtages": 12,
        "nombrePersonnes": 450,
        "parking": {
          "id": 1,
          "nombrePlacesTotal": 200,
          "placesAeriennes": 50,
          "placesSousDalle": 75,
          "placesSousSol": 75
        },
        "energies": [
          {
            "id": 1,
            "typeEnergie": "Électricité",
            "consommationAnnuelle": 850000.00,
            "unite": "kWh",
            "typeDonnee": "Réelle",
            "periodeDebut": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
            "periodeFin": "2024-12-31T23:59:59Z"
          }
        ],
        "materiaux": [
          {
            "id": 1,
            "materiauId": 1,
            "materiauNom": "Béton",
            "quantite": 5000.00,
            "unite": "t"
          }
        ],
        "createdAt": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z"
      }
    ]
    
Each site includes:
- All basic site information
- Parking details (if exists)
- All energy consumption records
- All materials with quantities and names

200.description: Returns the list of all sites

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

post.summary: Creates a new site with all related entities (parking, energies, materials)

requestBody.description: Complete site creation request with all related data

400.description: If the request is invalid or validation fails

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

patch.description:
Sample request:

    PATCH /api/sites/1
    {
      "nom": "Updated Site Name",
      "nombrePersonnes": 500
    }
    
Only include fields you want to update. All fields are optional.

requestBody.description: Fields to update (all fields are optional)

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

404.description: If the site does not exist

put.summary: Creates or updates parking information for a site
put.description:
Sample request:

    PUT /api/sites/1/parking
    {
      "nombrePlacesTotal": 200,
      "placesAeriennes": 50,
      "placesSousDalle": 75,
      "placesSousSol": 75
    }
    
If parking exists, it will be updated. If not, it will be created.

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

404.description: If the site does not exist

delete.summary: Deletes parking information for a site

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

404.description: If parking does not exist for this site

post.summary: Adds a new energy consumption record to a site

201.description: Returns the newly created energy record

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

404.description: If the site does not exist

put.summary: Updates an existing energy consumption record
put.description:
Sample request:

    PUT /api/sites/1/energies/5
    {
      "consommationAnnuelle": 900000.00,
      "typeDonnee": "Réelle"
    }
    
Only include fields you want to update.

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

404.description: If the site or energy record does not exist

delete.summary: Deletes an energy consumption record from a site

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

404.description: If the energy record does not exist

post.summary: Adds a material to a site
post.description:
Sample request:

    POST /api/sites/1/materiaux
    {
      "materiauId": 1,
      "quantite": 5000.00,
      "unite": "t"
    }
    
The material must exist in the materials catalog.
Cannot add the same material twice to a site.

requestBody.description: Material data with quantity and unit

201.description: Returns the newly created material relationship

400.description: If validation fails or material already exists

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

404.description: If the site or material does not exist

put.summary: Updates material quantity and unit for a site
put.description:
Sample request:

    PUT /api/sites/1/materiaux/3
    {
      "quantite": 6000.00
    }
    
Only include fields you want to update.
Cannot change the material ID, only quantity and unit.

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

404.description: If the relationship does not exist

delete.summary: Removes a material from a site

401.description: If authentication is missing or invalid

404.description: If the relationship does not exist

periodeFin.description: End date of the measurement period

unite.description: Unit of quantity (kg, t, m³, m²)

periodeFin.description: End date of the measurement period

ForgotPasswordRequest.description: Request model for initiating password reset

placesSousDalle.description: Number of parking spaces under concrete slab

token.description: Password reset token received via email

newPassword.description: New password (min 8 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, and digit)

ResetPasswordRequest.description: Request model for resetting password with token

SignInRequest.description: Request model for user sign in

password.description: User's password (min 8 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, and digit)

superficieM2.description: Total surface area in square meters

nombrePersonnes.description: Number of people occupying the site

unite.description: Unit of quantity (kg, t, m³, m²)

UpdateSiteMateriauRequest.description: Request model for updating a material record for a site

superficieM2.description: Total surface area in square meters

nombrePersonnes.description: Number of people occupying the site

UpsertParkingRequest.description: Request model for updating or creating parking information
